headline: Welcome to AIonOS for Aviation
caption: Meet the AI-native airport intelligence layer that keeps landside, terminal, airside and building systems moving as one — powered by SMART connectivity.
voice: Welcome to AIonOS for Aviation. Meet the AI-native airport intelligence layer that keeps landside, terminal, airside and building systems moving as one — powered by SMART connectivity.

headline: Arrival Surge Predicted Before Congestion Forms
caption: The Passenger Flow Agent detects an inbound surge while car park and transport agents prepare capacity before the queues become visible.
voice: Arrival Surge Predicted Before Congestion Forms. The Passenger Flow Agent detects an inbound surge while car park and transport agents prepare capacity before the queues become visible.

headline: Pedestrian Speed Signals Flag Peak Pressure
caption: Real-time motion analytics detect fast-forming pressure zones and trigger preemptive queue routing before bottlenecks escalate.
voice: Pedestrian Speed Signals Flag Peak Pressure. Real-time motion analytics detect fast-forming pressure zones and trigger preemptive queue routing before bottlenecks escalate.

headline: Crowd Heatmaps Trigger Staff Repositioning
caption: AIonOS converts anonymous mobility signals into crowd heatmaps and automatically recommends staffing, queue routing and wayfinding changes.
voice: Crowd Heatmaps Trigger Staff Repositioning. AIonOS converts anonymous mobility signals into crowd heatmaps and automatically recommends staffing, queue routing and wayfinding changes.

headline: Terminal Operations Become Self-Aware
caption: Inside the terminal, every gate, trolley, kiosk, wheelchair, retail zone and passenger flow becomes part of one operating model.
voice: Terminal Operations Become Self-Aware. Inside the terminal, every gate, trolley, kiosk, wheelchair, retail zone and passenger flow becomes part of one operating model.

headline: Belt Throughput Balancing Cuts Queue Spillover
caption: Conveyor utilization and arrival waves are synchronized to reduce claim-area buildup and improve passenger movement.
voice: Belt Throughput Balancing Cuts Queue Spillover. Conveyor utilization and arrival waves are synchronized to reduce claim-area buildup and improve passenger movement.

headline: Baggage Mismatch Risk Detected Early
caption: The Baggage Intelligence Agent tracks bag movement, flags mismatch risk and alerts teams before boarding cut-off.
voice: Baggage Mismatch Risk Detected Early. The Baggage Intelligence Agent tracks bag movement, flags mismatch risk and alerts teams before boarding cut-off.

headline: Pre-Board Queue Segmentation Keeps Gates Fluid
caption: The system separates boarding groups earlier and reduces congestion at gate touchpoints before final calls begin.
voice: Pre-Board Queue Segmentation Keeps Gates Fluid. The system separates boarding groups earlier and reduces congestion at gate touchpoints before final calls begin.

headline: Passenger Walk-Up Patterns Optimised
caption: Agent-driven prompts and lane balancing smooth walk-up cadence to protect turnaround timing.
voice: Passenger Walk-Up Patterns Optimised. Agent-driven prompts and lane balancing smooth walk-up cadence to protect turnaround timing.

headline: Boarding Sequence Re-Optimised in Real Time
caption: The Gate and Boarding Ops Agent monitors passenger density, protects jet bridge flow and resequences boarding to recover departure punctuality.
voice: Boarding Sequence Re-Optimised in Real Time. The Gate and Boarding Ops Agent monitors passenger density, protects jet bridge flow and resequences boarding to recover departure punctuality.

headline: Turnaround Risk Repaired Before It Cascades
caption: Airside agents track GSE, monitor turnaround tasks, detect zone violations and assign the nearest crew or equipment to protect departure time.
voice: Turnaround Risk Repaired Before It Cascades. Airside agents track GSE, monitor turnaround tasks, detect zone violations and assign the nearest crew or equipment to protect departure time.

headline: FOD Alert Dispatched in Under 30 Seconds
caption: The FOD and Runway Safety Agent uses AI camera feeds to detect runway debris and trigger the nearest response workflow instantly.
voice: FOD Alert Dispatched in Under 30 Seconds. The FOD and Runway Safety Agent uses AI camera feeds to detect runway debris and trigger the nearest response workflow instantly.

headline: The Airport Building Becomes Self-Optimising
caption: AI HVAC, lighting, fire safety, energy, ESG and vertical transport agents coordinate through one AI-BMS operations centre.
voice: The Airport Building Becomes Self-Optimising. AI HVAC, lighting, fire safety, energy, ESG and vertical transport agents coordinate through one AI-BMS operations centre.

headline: Weather Disruption Plans Trigger Automatically
caption: When weather risk rises, AIonOS pre-builds de-icing, gate and crew alternatives to protect network continuity.
voice: Weather Disruption Plans Trigger Automatically. When weather risk rises, AIonOS pre-builds de-icing, gate and crew alternatives to protect network continuity.

headline: One AI-Native Airport Operating System
caption: Smart Axiata provides the trusted connectivity fabric. AIonOS provides the intelligence layer. Together they convert airport complexity into coordinated action.
voice: One AI-Native Airport Operating System. Smart Axiata provides the trusted connectivity fabric. AIonOS provides the intelligence layer. Together they convert airport complexity into coordinated action.

headline: From Airline Operations to Predictive Outcomes
caption: AIonOS turns airline data, aircraft signals and passenger interactions into a live operating layer for Smart Axiata aviation clients.
voice: Commercial airlines operate on thin buffers. Smart Axiata provides the trusted connectivity layer, while AIonOS creates the intelligence layer across aircraft, passengers, operations and revenue.

headline: Aircraft Health Is Predicted Before AOG Risk
caption: Sensor streams from vibration, oil, pressure and temperature are converted into component risk scores and proactive work orders.
voice: The Predictive Aircraft Maintenance Agent watches real-time aircraft health signals. Instead of waiting for a ground event, AIonOS flags degradation forty eight to seventy two hours ahead and prepares maintenance action before availability is lost.

headline: Leakage Is Detected While Revenue Is Still Recoverable
caption: PSS, DCS, ancillary and interline patterns are monitored continuously to surface unbilled services and fare mismatches.
voice: The Revenue Leakage Agent scans bookings, check-in records, ancillaries and settlement data. Fare class mismatches, unbilled services and no-show leakage are surfaced while revenue teams can still recover value.

headline: Disruption Service Moves From Reactive to Proactive
caption: Voice, chat, loyalty and OCC signals are unified so customers receive rebooking and service guidance before they call.
voice: When disruption hits, passengers do not wait in blind queues. UniWeave connects reservations, loyalty, contact centre and operations, so AI agents can recommend rebooking, answer in Khmer or English, and reduce call centre pressure.

headline: Every Flight Becomes a Fuel Optimisation Opportunity
caption: Flight profiles, uplift, weather and route performance are analysed to reduce fuel burn and track carbon per tail and route.
voice: Fuel is one of the biggest controllable costs. AIonOS analyses climb, cruise, descent, uplift and weather signals to recommend fuel efficient options while tracking carbon output for every tail and route.

headline: Crew Recovery Options Are Ranked in Real Time
caption: Crew pairing, rest constraints and irregular operations are optimised to protect legality, cost and passenger continuity.
voice: Crew recovery is where complexity explodes. AIonOS ranks legal, cost-effective recovery options in real time, while Smart Axiata ensures the operating fabric stays connected across airline teams and airport partners.

headline: Air Cargo Becomes Visible End to End
caption: The Malaysian Airlines aircraft loading sequence shows how Smart Axiata IoT connectivity links cargo, handlers, aircraft, warehouses and road partners into one shipment intelligence layer.
voice: Smart Axiata plays a pivotal role in IoT connectivity by giving cargo airlines a trusted, always-on fabric across aircraft loading, ground handlers, warehouses and road partners. As the Malaysian Airlines aircraft loading sequence starts, the Cargo Digital Twin watches the operation end to end, the Shipment Visibility Agent turns every cargo movement into a live status signal, and SMART IoT Connectivity keeps the shipment intelligence layer online.

headline: Cargo Location, Condition and ETA Stay Live
caption: The IoT tracking sequence unifies sensors, RFID and cargo system events to monitor location, temperature, humidity, shock and predicted arrival.
voice: The IoT tracking sequence now takes over. The Real-Time Cargo Tracking Agent watches location, temperature, humidity and shock signals, the Chain of Custody Agent verifies each handling milestone, and the ETA Prediction Agent updates arrival confidence before customers ask where the shipment is.

headline: Every Kilogram and Cubic Metre Is Optimised
caption: Demand forecasting and load intelligence identify under-used capacity, yield dilution and ULD build improvements.
voice: Cargo revenue depends on using scarce capacity intelligently. The Capacity Yield Agent forecasts demand and yield opportunity, the ULD Load Optimiser balances weight and volume, and the Revenue Dilution Monitor flags low value bookings before they consume premium capacity.

headline: Deviation Risk Is Flagged Before Spoilage
caption: Temperature-sensitive cargo is monitored in real time and reroute or handling recommendations are triggered before SLA breach.
voice: For pharma, perishables and live cargo, the risk is not just delay. The Cold Chain Intelligence Agent monitors condition changes in real time, the Perishable Risk Model predicts spoilage exposure, and the Pharma SLA Monitor recommends handling changes before the shipment loses value.

headline: Clearance Moves From Manual Review to Exception Handling
caption: Shipment data is screened, classified, risk-scored and pre-populated for customs and compliance workflows.
voice: Customs and compliance move into an exception-led workflow. The Customs Automation Agent prepares clearance tasks, the HS Code Classifier improves classification accuracy, and the Compliance Risk Agent scores shipment risk so teams focus on the cases that actually need judgement.

headline: Air-to-Road Handoffs Are Orchestrated Automatically
caption: The platform matches freight to carriers, predicts delivery windows and connects shipper portals to last-mile execution.
voice: The journey does not end at the airport. The Intermodal Orchestration Agent manages the air-to-road handoff, the Last-Mile Routing Agent matches freight to delivery windows, and the Shipper Portal Agent gives customers one continuous view of service.

headline: Distribution Moves From Tracking to Self-Correction
caption: Factories, warehouses, fleets and resellers are connected into a control tower that predicts exceptions and recommends action.
voice: In supply chain, the goal is not another dashboard. Smart Axiata connects factories, depots and fleets, while AIonOS creates a control tower that predicts exceptions and recommends the next best action.

headline: Inventory and Dispatch Become Exception-Led
caption: Warehouse signals drive guided picking, dispatch sequencing, replenishment and SLA risk alerts.
voice: The Warehouse Agent watches inventory, picking, staging and dispatch. Instead of chasing errors after shipment, teams receive exception alerts, guided actions and dispatch sequences that protect service levels.

headline: Routes Adapt to Fuel, ETA and Service Risk
caption: Fleet telemetry and order demand are converted into dynamic routing, route adherence and delivery-window predictions.
voice: Fleet routing becomes adaptive. AIonOS uses telemetry, fuel exposure, route adherence and delivery promises to recommend route changes before the SLA fails.

headline: Customers See SLA Risk Before Escalation
caption: Manufacturer and distributor customers receive ETA, shipment status, proof-of-delivery and exception visibility.
voice: For downstream clients, trust comes from visibility. The client portal shows ETA, shipment status, proof of delivery integrity and exception risk before customers escalate.

headline: Commercial Risk Is Detected Across the Route-to-Market
caption: Price leakage, discount abuse, slow-moving SKUs and reseller churn signals are scored into recommended interventions.
voice: Supply chain performance also affects margin. AIonOS detects price leakage, discount abuse, route profitability risk and reseller churn signals, then recommends targeted interventions for sales teams.

headline: Pilot Value Is Proved Before Scale
caption: The proposition starts with selected lighthouse clients, baseline KPIs and a 90-day sprint to prove measurable outcomes.
voice: The GTM is simple. Select lighthouse accounts, baseline KPIs, deploy two to three agents, prove value in ninety days, then scale as a managed AI and connectivity offer for Cambodia.

headline: The Plant Becomes a Self-Learning Operating System
caption: Machine, vision, operator, ERP and network data are connected into agentic correction loops.
voice: Manufacturing clients do not need more disconnected pilots. Smart Axiata provides resilient plant connectivity, while AIonOS turns shopfloor, ERP, WMS, IoT, CCTV and fleet signals into correction loops.

headline: Defects Are Detected Before They Become Cost
caption: Vision and production signals detect defects, wrong SKU, packaging issues and line deviations early.
voice: The Quality Vision Agent detects defects, wrong SKU, packaging errors and line deviations. Suspect lots are blocked early and CAPA workflows are triggered before waste spreads across the line.

headline: Downtime Risk Is Predicted From Live Signals
caption: Vibration, current, temperature and utilisation patterns feed failure prediction, spares reservation and maintenance scheduling.
voice: The Machine Health Agent studies vibration, current, temperature and utilisation. When risk rises, AIonOS recommends maintenance windows, reserves spares and reduces unplanned downtime.

headline: Operators Get SOPs, Training and Escalation in Flow
caption: Digital SOPs, shift handover summaries and escalation routing help reduce labour pressure and turnover risk.
voice: The Operator Assist Agent supports the human workforce. Digital SOPs, training copilots, shift handover summaries and escalation routing help plants manage labour shortage and turnover without losing consistency.

headline: WIP, Schedule and Energy Are Balanced Continuously
caption: Production planning, WIP and energy signals are used to recommend line actions under cost, demand and resource pressure.
voice: The Production Twin Agent sees work in progress, schedule pressure, energy use and material constraints together. The result is a plant that recommends line actions instead of waiting for daily reviews.

headline: One Governed Platform, Many Manufacturing Agents
caption: UniStack, UniWeave, UniScale and UniProtect create a repeatable agent factory for factory, warehouse and route-to-market outcomes.
voice: The strategic value is repeatability. UniStack, UniWeave, UniScale and UniProtect create one governed agent factory for quality, maintenance, operators, warehouses, fleets and commercial resilience.

headline: Cambodian Banking Moves to AI-Grade Control
caption: Smart Axiata and AIonOS combine mobile identity, telco signals and agentic AI workflows for digital banking outcomes.
voice: Cambodian banking is at a digital inflection point. Smart Axiata brings reach, SIM identity and mobile insight. AIonOS brings the AI agents, controls and workflows needed for banking at transaction scale.

headline: Accounts Open in Minutes, Not Days
caption: Smart Verify and AI digital onboarding reduce branch visits, paper KYC and activation delay.
voice: Slow onboarding loses customers at the door. Smart Verify confirms identity through telco signals, while AIonOS automates document checks, liveness, watchlist screening and exception review.

headline: Thin-File Customers Become Scoreable
caption: Anonymised mobile usage, top-up, tenure and mobility patterns support credit decisions under consent and governance.
voice: For customers without formal credit history, banks need alternative intelligence. AIonOS combines consented bank data with anonymised Smart mobile patterns to help risk teams score previously thin-file borrowers.

headline: Fraud Is Scored Before Money Moves
caption: Transaction behaviour, location checks and relationship graphs are monitored for fraud, AML and SIM-swap risk.
voice: Real-time payments mean fraud can land before rules react. AIonOS scores transactions, uses graph-based AML monitoring and location checks, and gives analysts the risk story before money moves.

headline: NBC Reporting Becomes Audit-Ready by Default
caption: Suspicious transaction reports, loan decisions, KYC reviews and fraud case triage are logged, explainable and queued for human sign-off.
voice: Compliance remains human accountable, but not manually assembled. AIonOS drafts suspicious transaction reports, builds audit evidence, explains decisions and queues every high-risk workflow for human sign-off.

headline: Banking Service Becomes 24/7 and Personalised
caption: UniWeave powers voice, chat, app and web banking in Khmer and English while UniScale enables personalised retention and offers, closing with one connected AI operating layer across aviation, cargo, supply chain, manufacturing and banking.
voice: The customer experience layer becomes always on. UniWeave supports service across voice, chat, app and web in Khmer and English, while UniScale turns first party and partner signals into targeted retention and growth actions. The story closes with a single message: Smart Axiata provides the trusted digital fabric, AIonOS turns it into governed agentic intelligence, and together they help every sector move from reactive operations to predictive outcomes.
